content.full_text:
FPPC 712 Adelynn Dr
SEP 27 2:18 PM '90 San Gabriel, Cal
91775

Fair Pol. Prac. Comm.

The confusion caused by a
notice referring to a new senator,
but not naming him is ridiculous.

The writers of Prop73 surely
need, but please try to fix
the naming, or omit notices.

Also please note, I live in
Cal., not Canada.

yours truly
Edward Moore

sections.question_synthetic: The writer expresses confusion about a notice referring to a new senator without naming the specific individual, and requests that the FPPC either fix the naming in such notices or omit them entirely.

Contains informal complaint about Prop 73 implementation and notice naming issues.
